parsed.company_summary: Bold Business is an AI-first U.S. based global workforce solutions company that builds AI-Amplified Talent, custom AI agents, and automation systems for clients like AT&T, JP Morgan, and Verizon.

Stripe is a company building financial infrastructure for the internet, handling millions of transactions per day.

must_have_skills: Node.JS or .NET Core and Web API

nice_to_have_skills: experience processing large amounts of data
parsed.company_summary: Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers, and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Uses 'olympian-level work ethic' language — similar to 'rockstar/ninja' culture signals, indicating potentially unsustainable work expectations.
Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests a culture that may expect excessive hours.
Daily stand-up at 7:30am PST — early mandatory meeting may indicate rigid schedule expectations despite claiming flexibility.
Unlimited PTO listed alongside 'we work hard' and founders working six days a week — potential contradiction suggesting PTO may not be truly taken.

must_have_skills: Software development lifecycle (requirements gathering, technical documentation, system design, implementation, code review, testing, deployment, production support)
Designing, executing, and analyzing A/B tests
Leading complex technical initiatives (large-scale migrations, refactoring)
Cross-functional collaboration with product, design, data, and engineering teams
parsed.company_summary: Nextdoor is a social networking platform that connects neighbors to build real-world connections, share trusted information, and support local businesses and public services across 305,000+ neighborhoods in 11 countries.

must_have_skills: proficient in at least one modern programming language (Go, C#, Java, Kotlin, Rust, etc.)

located in San Francisco or the Bay Area (or willing to relocate)
parsed.company_summary: Metriport is an open-source data intelligence platform that helps healthcare organizations access and exchange patient data in real-time. They have multi-million ARR, 100+ customers (including Amazon One Medical), and backing from top VCs.
red_flags: Founders work six days a week from the SF office — suggests an intense culture that may not be sustainable for all.
Unlimited PTO listed alongside 'we work hard' and founders working six days a week — may indicate a culture where taking PTO is discouraged.
Asks candidates to question 'why can't it be done in 3 days?' when a project is estimated at 3 weeks — could indicate unrealistic expectations around delivery timelines.
